name: slider
title: BTSlider
description: Interactive range slider atom (Figma 434:7617). Supports three layout types (default, range, vertical) and two color variants (primary, destructive). Thumb has hover/press halo (Figma 434:7227). disabled toggles interaction.

files.content:
export { BTSlider } from './BTSlider';
export type { BTSliderProps, BTSliderType, BTSliderVariant } from './BTSlider.types';
